raw_text:
NexGen Mobile Labs

Empowering seamless mobile experiences through innovative Android solutions

JUNIOR ANDROID ENGINEER

San Francisco, CA · Full-time · $75,000 - $95,000 per year

We're seeking a Junior Android Engineer to join our growing mobile development team. You'll work

on production Android applications using Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and modern Android architecture

patterns. This role offers mentorship from senior engineers, exposure to the full app development

lifecycle, and the opportunity to contribute to apps used by thousands of users. Ideal for someone

with foundational Android knowledge eager to deepen their expertise in a collaborative environment.

ABOUT US

NexGen Mobile Labs is a forward-thinking mobile application development studio founded in 2019.

We specialize in building high-performance Android applications for startups and mid-market

enterprises. Our team of 45+ engineers is dedicated to creating intuitive, scalable mobile solutions
that solve real-world problems. We pride ourselves on fostering a collaborative learning environment

where engineers grow their skills through mentorship and hands-on experience with modern Android
technologies.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

Develop new features and UI screens using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose under guidance from

senior engineers

Implement data persistence using Room database for offline-first application functionality

Build asynchronous operations with Coroutines to handle network requests and background
tasks efficiently

Write clean, maintainable code following established coding standards and participate in peer
code reviews

Collaborate with designers and product managers to translate wireframes and requirements
into functional Android interfaces

Debug and resolve issues in existing features using Android Studio debugging tools and
profilers

Participate in sprint planning, stand-ups, and retrospectives with the development team

Learn and apply Android best practices, design patterns, and architectural principles under
mentorship

REQUIRED

0-2 years of professional Android development experience or relevant internship experience

Proficiency in Kotlin programming language

 Working knowledge of Android Studio and Gradle build system

Understanding of Android lifecycle, Activities, Fragments, and basic app architecture

Familiarity with REST APIs and JSON data handling

Strong problem-solving skills and ability to learn quickly

NICE TO HAVE

Experience building UI with Jetpack Compose or declarative UI frameworks

Experience with Coroutines for asynchronous programming in Kotlin

Familiarity with local data persistence using Room or SQLite

Published app on Google Play Store or contributed to open-source Android projects

Knowledge of dependency injection patterns and frameworks like Hilt

TECH STACK

Kotlin   Jetpack Compose   Coroutines   Room Database   Android Studio   Gradle   Retrofit

  Google Play Store

Material Design 3   AndroidX Libraries

BENEFITS

Competitive salary with annual review and performance bonuses

Comprehensive health insurance (medical, dental, vision)

Professional development budget ($2,000 annually) for courses, conferences, and certifications

Flexible work arrangement (remote-friendly with 2 days per week in-office collaboration)

Mentorship program pairing junior engineers with senior developers

Casual work environment with modern office perks (free snacks, coffee bar, gaming room)

Paid time off (20 days annually) plus 5 personal development days

HOW TO APPLY

Submit your resume, a portfolio or GitHub link showcasing Android projects, and a brief cover letter
explaining your interest in Android development to careers@nexgenmobilelabs.com. Please include
any links to apps you've built or contributed to. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis. We
also welcome questions about the role—feel free to reach out!
